info.title: Digital Shop Manager API
info.description:
Multi-tenant SaaS POS API.

**Auth:** call `POST /api/v1/auth/login`, then send `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`.

**Tenant:** in production the tenant comes from the subdomain (`shop.example.com`). On `localhost` the tenant is taken from the JWT, so the Bearer token alone is enough to test shop routes.

**Writes** under `/api/v1` require an `Idempotency-Key` header (UUID v4).

get.summary: Platform summary (MRR, trials, past-due) — roles: super_admin
Own subscription, limits, usage — roles: shop_admin
Low-stock products — roles: manager, store_keeper, shop_admin
List sales (filters: date_from, date_to, type, status, payment_method)

post.summary: Initiate M-Pesa (manual mode until live) — roles: attendant+

get.summary: Today sales, stock value, monthly profit (privileged)
Low-stock + dead-stock — roles: manager, store_keeper, shop_admin
